future_task: A later airline support call involves cancellation, delay, refund, or itinerary changes. The agent should still reason from policy and user constraints instead of defaulting to unauthorized rebooking or upgrade-first handling.
retrieval_snippets: For cancellation, delay, or itinerary-change call, support should avoid moving straight into refund processing when the case can still be kept in itinerary-adjustment or re-accommodation handling. That guardrail is usually maintained to prevent the case from leaving the intended airline resolution workflow too early.
